seoTitle: Warramboo vs Warraweena — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Warramboo and Warraweena. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Warramboo and Warraweena.
heading: Warramboo vs Warraweena — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Warramboo, South Australia and Warraweena, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Warraweena has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Warramboo (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Warramboo or Warraweena safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Warramboo has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Warraweena scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Warramboo scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. Warraweena scores 44/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Warramboo or Warraweena?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Warraweena has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.62% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
